title: Hyper: The Stevie Hyper D Story
original_title: Hyper: The Stevie Hyper D Story
overview: Darrell Austin, Stevie Hyper D's nephew, embarks on a journey through 90s London to explore his uncle's legacy. Through conversations with family, friends, and artists Stevie inspired, he pieces together the full story.
